hero.subtitle: The dual-personality AI chatbot designed exclusively for luxury wellness centers. Deliver exceptional guest service 24/7 while your team focuses on what matters most.

problems.title: The Challenge Facing Luxury Wellness Centers
problems.description: Your guests expect immediate, personalized responses. Your staff deserves to focus on delivering exceptional in-person experiences, not answering repetitive inquiries.

card1.title: After-Hours Inquiries
card1.text: Miss bookings when guests research services outside business hours

card2.title: Repetitive Questions
card2.text: Staff spend hours answering the same service and pricing questions

card3.title: International Guests
card3.text: Language barriers create friction in the luxury guest experience

card4.title: Lost Opportunities
card4.text: No insights into what guests are asking about before they book

product.label: The Solution
product.title: Meet 4-Eyes: Your Dual-Personality AI Assistant
product.description: Not just another chatbot. 4-Eyes is specifically designed for the wellness industry, with two distinct personalities that adapt to your guests' journey.

preSales.title: The Wellness Concierge
preSales.description: Engages prospective guests with detailed information about your services, treatments, packages, and wellness journeys. Answers questions about pricing, availability, and helps guests discover the perfect experience.

postSales.title: The Operations Officer
postSales.description: Handles operational needs for confirmed guests. Manages appointment modifications, provides booking status updates, handles arrival notifications, and addresses service-related questions.

feature1.title: Seamless Integration
feature1.description: Connects effortlessly with your existing spa management systems. No expensive overhauls, no technical headaches.

feature2.title: Business-Friendly Customization
feature2.description: Update services, pricing, and responses yourself. No coding required, no waiting for developers.

feature3.title: Multi-Language Support
feature3.description: Serve international guests in their preferred language. Expand your reach without hiring multilingual staff.

feature4.title: Analytics Dashboard
feature4.description: Understand what guests ask about most. Identify trends, optimize offerings, and make data-driven decisions.

feature5.title: Privacy & Security
feature5.description: GDPR compliant and built with wellness industry privacy standards. Your guests' data is protected.

feature6.title: Instant Responses
feature6.description: Never keep a potential guest waiting. Provide immediate, accurate answers any time of day or night.

item1.title: Capture More Bookings
item1.description: Convert curious browsers into confirmed guests. 4-Eyes engages visitors instantly, answers their questions comprehensively, and guides them toward booking—even at 3 AM when your staff is offline.
item1.point2: Instant responses prevent visitors from going to competitors

item2.title: Free Your Staff's Time
item2.description: Let 4-Eyes handle the routine inquiries while your team focuses on delivering the exceptional in-person experiences that define luxury wellness. Reduce repetitive tasks by up to 60%.
item2.point1: Automate FAQs about services, pricing, and policies
item2.point2: Handle booking modifications without staff intervention

item3.title: Enhance Guest Satisfaction
item3.description: Modern luxury means convenience. Guests expect instant, accurate information delivered seamlessly. 4-Eyes provides the immediate, personalized attention that elevates your brand.
item3.point3: Proactive updates on booking status and arrivals

item4.title: Gain Business Intelligence
item4.description: Every conversation is a data point. Understand what guests are truly interested in, identify trending treatments, and spot opportunities to optimize your service offerings.
item4.point1: Track most-asked questions and popular services
item4.point2: Identify gaps in your service information
item4.point3: Measure conversion patterns and optimize messaging

howItWorks.label: Implementation
howItWorks.title: From Consultation to Conversation in Weeks
howItWorks.description: We've streamlined the implementation process to minimize disruption while maximizing value for your wellness center.

step1.title: Discovery & Customization
step1.description: We learn about your services, brand voice, and unique offerings. Together, we configure 4-Eyes to reflect your spa's personality and expertise.

step2.title: Seamless Integration
step2.description: Our team connects 4-Eyes with your existing spa management system. No disruption to your operations, no technical burden on your staff.

step3.title: Training & Testing
step3.description: We train 4-Eyes on your specific services, policies, and workflows. Rigorous testing ensures accuracy before launch. You maintain full control over customization.

step4.title: Launch & Optimization
step4.description: Go live and start capturing more bookings. We monitor performance, gather insights, and continuously optimize based on real guest interactions.

pricing.label: Investment
pricing.title: Custom Solutions for Your Wellness Center
pricing.description: Every luxury spa is unique. We create tailored pricing based on your specific needs, guest volume, and integration requirements.

card.title: Let's Design Your Perfect Solution
card.subtitle: Our pricing considers:
card.factor1: Number of locations and treatment rooms
card.factor3: Integration complexity with your existing systems
card.ctaText: Schedule a consultation to discuss your needs and receive a custom proposal.

contact.label: Get Started
contact.title: Schedule Your Consultation
contact.description: Discover how 4-Eyes can transform your guest experience and operations. We'll discuss your specific needs and show you exactly how our dual-personality AI can drive results for your wellness center.

expect.title: What to Expect:
expect.item2: Discussion of your specific needs and challenges
expect.item5: ROI analysis for your wellness center

message.label: Tell Us About Your Needs
message.placeholder: What challenges are you facing? What would you like to learn about 4-Eyes?

footer.description: Intelligent conversation technology designed exclusively for luxury spa and wellness centers.

chatbot.title: 4-Eyes AI Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: AI for Wellness
chatbot.welcome: Welcome to Serenity Spa. I'm here to guide you through our wellness sanctuary and help you discover the perfect treatment for your needs. Whether you're seeking relaxation, rejuvenation, or a transformative spa experience, I'm delighted to assist you with booking support, services, and personalized recommendations.
chatbot.hint: How may I assist you with your wellness journey today?
chatbot.quickReply1: What can you help me with?
chatbot.quickReply3: How do I book an appointment?
